prompt: Predict the scene one second ahead in the game, as the player presses the only available move.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Advance the soccer game scene by one second, showing the immediate outcome of the 'POWER SHOOT' being executed by the player in the green jersey (#7, resembling Cristiano Ronaldo) who just headed the ball. The soccer ball should now be transformed into a blazing, high-speed projectile, visually depicted with a fiery trail and motion blur, rapidly approaching or having just entered the goal on the left. The goalie in the blue and white jersey (#1), positioned by the goal, should be captured in a dynamic, reactive pose, such as a diving save attempt or having just failed to block the shot. Player #7 should be in a follow-through or triumphant pose, looking towards the goal. Other players on the field should also be reacting to the intense shot.
objects: goalie (#1, blue and white jersey) in a dynamic, reactive pose
player #7 (green jersey, resembling Cristiano Ronaldo) in a follow-through or triumphant pose
other players on the field reacting to the shot
